title: Bubbles Best
description: This modpack is for when you are looking for a more relaxed enjoyable way to play minecraft. escape your worries for a while and cook many dishes, build your dream home and farm at your own pace.
body:
The modpack was made for the new Bubbles Best server! but feel free to use this pack for your own general use. This modpack will suit people looking for something relaxed and casual. You can take the edge off and play in a calmer setting where you can cook, hunt, farm and raise livestock with a cosy home alone or with friends

We created this pack for a more relaxed view of a better minecraft, as a lot of us use minecraft as a way of escaping the worlds struggles for a while, sometimes for mental issues or sometimes just to relieve stress, without bothering too much about preparing for the next boss.

This is the list of mods this pack currently uses-
- [animal feeding trough](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal_feeding_trough),are you tired of checking if you can feed your livestock? put your feed in a trough and the animals will help themselves when ready!
- [builders crafts & additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/buildersaddition), craft tables,  stools, chairs, pillows, sofas and much more and make your house feel like a home!
- [cadmus](https://modrinth.com/mod/cadmus), claim your own plot of land that is safe from thieves and trolls!
- [carry on](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on), pick up your pigs and chickens and carry them home no waiting for them to catch up, also works with chests still carrying its contents! moving things around has never been easyer!
- [chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel), craft a chisel and turn your standard blocks into something more creative!
- [comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts), want to sleep away from home without reseting your spawn point? you can craft a simple sleeping bag or hammock!
- [creeper firework](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-firework), tired of everything having holes in because a creeper decided to self destruct? fear no more for they now explode into harmles beautiful colored fireworks!
- [farmers delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), make a frying pan or stew pot and make everything from an egg sandwich to spagetti bolognaise!
- [farming for blockheads](https://modrinth.com/mod/farming-for-blockheads), adds a seed market where you can buy seeds saplings and bonemeal you will no longer need to be far in search of farming rescorces or wood of a cirtain type
- [fishermans trap](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishermens-trap) if your like me and get bored of watching a float, but you dont want to cheat and afk this mod will use your bread berries and other things to passively trap fish for you!
- [gravestone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod), all of your things when you die gets conviniently put into a gravestone and you will spawn with a paper in hand that tells you where you dropped your things where you can retrieve all your items conviniently back exactly where you placed them!
- [guard villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers), looking after a village can be daunting the villagers normally cant protect themselves and you need to save them ever night or risk losing your experienced villagers, well not anymore now several guards will spawn in villages and fight off the evil that roams the night!
- [inventory profiles next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next), simple easy to use tweaks that make inventory sorting a breeze
- [iron door key](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next), stop those pesky villagers intruding your house and taking your beds without the need of a button by your iron door, you can just put your key in your offhand and open your iron door with ease!
- [just annother rotten flesh to leather mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jrftl), if leather is too scarce, get that unused rotten flesh to good use!
- [just enough items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), with so many different items and cooking recipies this is a good way to track what you need and how to craft!
- [journey map](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap), locate all the places you have been and pin any locations to be seen in game with costom colors all on one convinient map
- [lightmans currency](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightmans-currency) this is a mod mostly for multiplayer use that adds a coin based money system and a range of trading machines that you can craft and set up to your liking that carry on working even while you are not online
- [lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr),if your late on a server and all the loot has been taken then fear no more as all loot boxes can now be opened by everyone with loot tables for every person!
- [luck perms](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms),this helps us moderate and also helps you keep your land claimed under controll and give permissions to people you trust
- [name tag tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/name-tag-tweaks), named your sheep fluffy but a wolf wanted the mutton for tea is so annoying now you can pick up its name tag and pass the name to its decendants!
- [natures compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass), for help finding biomes that you cant seem to find .
- [no hostiles around campfire](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-hostiles-around-campfire), sometimes you walk out your door to be ambushed by hostiles, now you can place a campfire outside and you can walk out your house with confidence giving you time to prepare for an attack
- [portable tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/ptables), another simple mod that takes away that devious placing and picking up of many usable items just attach it to a stick and use it!
- [random bone meal flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/random-bone-meal-flowers), i run out of dye a lot and with spare bones lying around you can spawn random flowers on the grass!
- [sophisticated backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks), one of the best mods i have come across so far, backpacks can be upgraded for more space and also have upgrade slots where you can put many different crafted or looted upgrades to your backpack that make a great difference
- [trash cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans), get rid of your unwanted things and stop leaving them lying about or taking storage space
- [tree harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester), building up to take down a tall tree is annoying for many people so with this you can chop a tree from where you stand and the rest will follow!
- [village spawn point ](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-spawn-point), as you enter a game your world spawn will be at the nearest village giving you a nice starting point
- [simple voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat). proximity and group voice chat without the use of external sites

all dependancies included

- If you want to join our server or help our admin create an even better world contact us on our
[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/gYdnpUMUEb)
